understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate a grid-based level, modifying the carried piece's shape, color, and rotation to match the requirements of all goal cells, then stepping onto them to complete the level, while conserving stamina and lives across multiple levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves in four directions (N, S, E, W), spending stamina each turn. Walls block movement, leaving the player in place and still consuming stamina. Modifier tiles (shape, color, rotation) automatically change the carried piece's attributes when stepped on: shape/color cycle through options, rotation increments 90° clockwise. A goal cell is only completed when the piece's shape, color, and rotation exactly match its displayed requirements at the moment of stepping onto it. Stamina is lost on each move; when stamina reaches zero, a life is lost, and losing all lives ends the game.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate a grid-based level, modifying the carried piece's shape, color, and rotation to match the requirements of all goal cells, then stepping onto them to complete the level, while conserving stamina and lives across multiple levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves in four directions (N, S, E, W), spending stamina each turn. Walls block movement, leaving the player in place and still consuming stamina. Modifier tiles (shape, color, rotation) automatically change the carried piece's attributes when stepped on: shape/color cycle through options, rotation increments 90° clockwise. A goal cell is only completed when the piece's shape, color, and rotation exactly match its displayed requirements at the moment of stepping onto it. Stamina is lost on each move; when stamina reaches zero, a life is lost, and losing all lives ends the game.
